title: Speedscale BYOC OTel Collector → OTLP backend chart values

endpoint.description: EXACT OTLP logs endpoint URL (full path), e.g. https://<env-id>.live.dynatrace.com/api/v2/otlp/v1/logs

headerName.description: Auth header name (Authorization, dd-api-key, x-honeycomb-team, api-key, …)

headerPrefix.description: Value prefix prepended to the token (e.g. 'Api-Token ' for Dynatrace; empty for most)

tokenSecret.description: K8s Secret name holding the API token/key under data key 'token'
